title: En Nanbane Lyrics Mankatha Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Madhusree, Yuvan
Song : Nanbane
Lyrics : Vaali
Music Director : Yuvan Shankar Raja

En Nanbane ennai yethaayo
En paavamaai vandhu vaaithaai
Un polave nalla nadigan oh.
Oorengilum illai oruvan

Nallavargal yaaro, theeyavargal yaaro
Kandukondu kanni yaarum kadhal seivadhilaye
Gangai nadhi yellam kanil nadhiyendru
Pirpaadu gnanam vandhu laabam ennavo

Kadhal enbathu, kanavu maaligai
Purindhu kolladi en thozhiye
Unmai kadhalai naan thaedi parkiren
Kaanavillaye en thozhiye..

Valaikkayai pidithu, valaikayail vilndhu
Valakaram pidithu, valam vara ninaithaen
Uravennum kavithai, uyirnil varaindhu
Ezhuthiya kavithai,
en muthal vari mudhal mulluvadhum pilai vizhigalil vali
Vilundhadhu, ellaam unnaalthaan
Idhuponra gnyangal, enaken indha kaayangal
Kilithaai Oru kadhal oviyam ..oh

Murugan mugam aaru thaan
Manothan mugam nooru thaan
Ovvendrum veru veru niramo

En Nanbane ennai yethaai...
Kaadhal velluma,kaadhal thorkuma
Yaarum arindhathilaye en thozhiye
kaadhal oviyam kilindhu ponadha
Kavalai yenadi Idhuvum kadandhidum

Adikadi ennai nee, annaithathai ariven
Anbennum vizhakai annaithathai ariven
Puyal vandhu saaitha manam oru viragu
Unnakenna theiriyum
En idhayathil vandhu vilundhathu idi
Ilam manam engum irundhadhu vali
Emma emma ulagil ulla pengale
Uraipen oru ponmozhi

Kadhal oru kanavu maaligai.. oh ..
Idhuvum angu maayam thaan
Ellam varnajaalam thaan
Nambaamal vazhvadhenrum nalame...

Kadhal enbathu, kanavu maaligai
Purindhu kolladi en thozhiye
Unmai kadhalai naan thaedi parkiren
Kaanavillaye en thozhiye..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'En Nanbane'?

The song 'En Nanbane' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, encapsulating the feelings of connection between lovers.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie Mankatha?

This song plays during a romantic sequence in Mankatha, highlighting the relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Madhusree and Yuvan, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'En Nanbane' released?

'En Nanbane' was released on August 10, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'En Nanbane', the characters experience a profound connection that transcends the ordinary, making it a pivotal moment in the film Mankatha. The song's romantic and nostalgic vibe evokes feelings of love and longing, beautifully portrayed through the heartfelt lyrics by Vaali. With Madhusree and Yuvan's captivating vocals, the melody resonates deeply, making it a favorite among fans. This enchanting duet encapsulates the essence of romance, making it perfect for special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Nanbane from Mankatha is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Madhusree and Yuvan, paired with Yuvan's signature music style, this song creates a heartfelt atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this collaboration that brings together soulful lyrics and captivating melodies.
stanzaMeanings: My friend, you have come to me in my helplessness. You are a good actor like no other.
Who are the good people, who are the bad? Everyone is in love with someone. The river Ganges is like a river in the mind, knowledge and benefits come from it.
Love is a palace of dreams. Understand this, my friend. I am searching for true love. There is no vision, my friend.

Holding onto the past, I thought of the future. Poetry of relationships, life comes alive. The poetry I wrote, from the first line to the last, fell into the eyes of the child. Everything is because of you. These thoughts, these feelings, are all about you. A love painting... oh.
Murugan's face is like a six-faced deity. The face of my beloved is like a hundred faces. Each one is different in its own way.
My friend, you have come to me... Is love a victory or a defeat? No one knows, my friend. The love painting has faded away. Why worry? This too shall pass.

You know everything about me, you know all my love. The storm has come and taken away my heart. What do you know? It has fallen into my heart. This young heart has been troubled everywhere. Oh, oh, women of the world, I will speak a golden word.
Love is a palace of dreams... oh... This too is an illusion. Everything is a colorful illusion. Without us, life will continue to be good...
Love is a palace of dreams. Understand this, my friend. I am searching for true love. There is no vision, my friend.
Mankatha Song Lyrics My friend, open the bottle. This is our party. My friend, come on, let's go without delay.
